ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "requirement_location" TEXT /* Location of the requirement being tested (e.g., Riscv spec, User manual) */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature being tested (e.g., Stores visible, External handshake) */,
  "sub_feature" TEXT /* Sub-feature being tested (e.g., None, Req high) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "verification_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the verification (e.g., Check against RM, Assertion Check) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., Draft, Active, Archived) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Estimated or actual duration of the test */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the test type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type (e.g., Constrained-Random, Directed) */,
  "test_execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Result of the test (Pass or Fail) */,
  "coverage_method" TEXT /* Method used for coverage analysis (e.g., Functional Coverage, Assertion Coverage) */,
  "link_to_coverage" TEXT /* Link to the coverage report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Description of the failure reason if the test failed */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if a retest is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processors" (
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processor core */,
  "processor_name" TEXT /* Name of the processor core */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the processor core (e.g., RISC-V, ARM) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the processor entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the processor entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the processor entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "architecture_version" TEXT /* Version of the processor architecture */,
  "core_count" TEXT /* Number of cores in the processor */,
  "clock_speed" TEXT /* Clock speed of the processor */,
  "memory_size" TEXT /* Memory size supported by the processor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processor core being tested */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test execution was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test execution */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of the test execution */,
  "execution_method" TEXT /* Method used for test execution (e.g., simulation, emulation, formal verification) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was executed (e.g., Simulation, Emulation, Formal Verification) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test execution (e.g., Running, Completed, Failed) */,
  "test_log" TEXT /* Link to the test log file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_processor_id FOREIGN KEY ("processor_id") REFERENCES processors ("processor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_data" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage data point */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., line coverage, statement coverage) */,
  "coverage_value" REAL /* Value of the coverage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the coverage data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the coverage data was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the coverage data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the coverage (e.g., specific lines covered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_data_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test suite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test suite was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test suite */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test suite (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test suite (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suite_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite execution */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test suite execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test suite execution was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test suite execution */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of the test suite execution */,
  "execution_method" TEXT /* Method used for test suite execution (e.g., simulation, emulation, formal verification) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test suite execution */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test suite execution (e.g., Running, Completed, Failed) */,
  "test_log" TEXT /* Link to the test log file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suite_executions_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Test Engineer, Manager) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution */,
  "coverage_value" REAL /* Value of the coverage */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate of the test execution */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the analytics data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics data was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the analytics data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tests in the execution */,
  "failed_test_count" INTEGER /* Number of failed tests */,
  "passed_test_count" INTEGER /* Number of passed tests */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Overall status of the test execution (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)
